properties.name: jeap.messaging.idempotent-processing.insert-mode
properties.description: Strategy used to insert idempotent processing records. With 'auto' (the default), the PostgreSQL-specific 'INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING' insert is used on PostgreSQL and the portable 'INSERT ... WHERE NOT EXISTS' insert on any other database.

values.description: Choose the insert strategy based on the database in use: 'on-conflict-do-nothing' on PostgreSQL, 'where-not-exists' otherwise.

Portable insert using 'INSERT ... SELECT ... WHERE NOT EXISTS'. Works on any SQL database. A concurrent insert of the same idempotent processing record by another transaction surfaces as a unique constraint violation.

PostgreSQL-specific insert using 'INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING'. A concurrent insert of the same idempotent processing record by another transaction does not raise an error: the message is skipped silently if the other transaction committed the record.
